purpose: Prevent future true-1min searches from silently omitting sidecar/event/context fields, falling back to old 1D data, or claiming field usage when evaluated signals are empty.
required_before: Phase3CP/CM reward loop restart using augmented sidecars
Any claim that new event/context/fundamental fields are used in train/validation/test
forbidden_data_roots: legacy 1D default panel for true1min claims

guard_routes.role: write augmented true1min shard root without modifying original root
verify field lifecycle from schema to train/validation/test coverage and evaluated candidate usage

hard_pass_requirements: shard root contains true trade_time panels
candidate fields are a subset of the panel schema intersection
event_state and lagged_context fields have typed atoms when present
event_state and lagged_context candidate files show non-empty effective signal usage before success is claimed
candidate aggregate and top decisions are both audited when available
chronological train/validation/test field coverage is reported
future/label fields are blocked from candidates

known_20260625_result.reason: schema and split coverage passed, but the old event_state top_decisions had zero effective signal rows for event/context candidates

next_actions: Use event and lagged-context atom quotas in Phase3BP for new event_state runs
Use schema-bound Phase3CP generation by default; require explicit allow-unbound-generation for legacy diagnostics
Re-run Phase3CT against new event_state top_decisions
Run Phase3CT against phase3bp_candidate_horizon_aggregate.csv as well as phase3bp_top_decisions.csv
Only then allow larger event/context search
